result.stdout:
Description:
  WINDOWS ONLY - Adds or retrieves an encrypted secure key from the machine environment variables.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys [options]

Options:
  --name <name> (REQUIRED)  The API Key Name to store or retrieve securely on the server system environment
  --value <value>           The API Key value to store securely on the server system environment. If not provided, the tool will output the value of the requested API Key Name. [default: 18e87946-0a88-4c26-bd7f-737fcedb65a]
  --version                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
